title: Range — dispersion practice
description: Use Rapsodo **Range** simulation mode (gameType range). Pick one club and a target line; hit ~40–50 balls focusing on offline consistency. Review the dispersion plot after the session — this is the primary mode for tightening driver, fairway wood, and hybrid patterns.
distances: Full swings — one club per session
success_target: Complete session with tighter offline than recent baseline for that club
default_aim: Pick a target line; keep the majority of shots inside a 20-yard offline window (adjust for club).

title: Practice — direction window
description: Use Rapsodo **Practice** mode (free LM session). Direction game: pick one club and a start line; only count shots that finish inside a narrow left/right window. Check spin axis if the ball curves consistently one way.
success_target: Complete session hitting the stated offline window aim
default_aim: 10-yard accuracy window left/right of target line; reset if you miss the window 3 in a row.

title: Practice — distance game
description: Use Rapsodo **Practice** mode. Distance game: random targets, change clubs often (~50 balls). Focus on carry control and gapping — note which clubs show the widest offline or biggest carry gaps.
success_target: Complete ~45 min block; log the club that needed the most attention
default_aim: Random targets, change clubs every 5–10 shots; note worst dispersion club at end.

title: Target Range — approach practice
description: Use Rapsodo **Target Range** simulation mode. Iron and approach focus: assign yourself targets at realistic approach distances and score proximity. Best for mid-iron dispersion and approach consistency (not full driver work).
success_target: Complete target session with stable carry and lateral control
default_aim: Hit assigned green targets; prioritise carry consistency and start line.

title: Rapsodo Combine
description: Use Rapsodo **Combine** mode (dedicated combine session type). Structured scoring across distances — log your combine score if shown. Good for gapping checks and scored practice when dispersion is stable.
success_target: Finish combine block; beat or match your recent combine score
default_aim: Complete full combine; log total score from Rapsodo if displayed.

title: Closest to the Pin
description: Use Rapsodo **Closest to the Pin** simulation mode. Wedge and short-iron proximity scoring — one primary club, tight landing zone focus.
success_target: Complete CTP session with majority inside proximity target
default_aim: Land within 15 ft of pin on majority of shots from chosen distance.
